creator: toasty@dragondata.com
text:
Switching around the words 'inet' and 'alias' cause a kernel panic.

Fix: 

Be careful when typing ifconfig commands as root. :)
How-To-Repeat: ifconfig ep0 inet alias 204.137.237.1 netmask 0xffffffff

instead of

ifconfig ep0 alias inet 204.137.237.1 netmask 0xffffffff

(or do I have that switched around?)
